prose:
Method provenance.
Property: Fukui reactivity analysis (condensed Fukui functions; most electrophilic site f⁺ value reported).
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting (PySCF backend).
Geometry provenance: user-supplied phenol.xyz (13 atoms) used as-is; no further optimization (single-point calculations for neutral, N+1, and N−1 charge states).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
Charge and multiplicity: neutral singlet (0, 1) for N state; cation (+1, 2) and anion (−1, 2) for N±1 states.
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (PySCF 2.x under the hood; Mulliken charges from converged SCF calculations).
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles converged for all three charge states (converged: true). The integrity checker reports `status: ok`, `trustworthy: true`. Warnings returned by the engine are reproduced verbatim below.
